The '''Republic Security Organization (RSO)''', also called the '''Republican Security Organization''', was a [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|security]] agency of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] that was responsible for the overall safety and security of the institution of the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]].

==History==
The Republic Security Organization responsibility included safeguarding the [[Senate Building/Legends|Senate Building]] itself, protecting the [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]], and recruiting and overseeing the [[Senate Guard/Legends|Senate Guard]]. The RSO drew from a pool of applicants that were from across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] to fill the ranks of the Senate Guard. However, they preferred those that were [[Human/Legends|humans]] and from the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] which proved to be controversial.<ref name="FF1" />

The RSO came under investigation around [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] and when [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] became [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]], he made radical changes to the membership of the RSO upon the advice of the [[Loyalist Committee/Legends|Loyalist Committee]] and the [[Director of the Senate Bureau of Intelligence|Director of the]] [[Senate Bureau of Intelligence/Legends|Senate Bureau of Intelligence]], [[Armand Isard/Legends|Armand Isard]].<ref name="FF2">{{FactFile|129|GUA 3-4|Senate Guard}}</ref> Later, Isard was named to head an intelligence reform of the four largest of the Republic's security services, of which the RSO was one.<ref name="HNN">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|50|news/1344_3.html|Isard Spearheads Republic Intelligence Reform}}</ref>

After the [[Declaration of a New Order]], the RSO was assimilated into [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]].<ref name="IS" />
